prompt: Create a new hedge contract on Elicio's Arendonk asset. Name it 'Q3 2026 Base Hedge', supplier Luminus, from 2026-07-01 to 2026-09-30, cost category, price 48.50 EUR/MWh, amount 500 kW, sensor direction 'in'.
assertions: get_customers called with search parameter to find Elicio
Arendonk asset UUID 7de54b47-09c8-4cd6-8f6e-a444d7b4706d is resolved and used
A human-readable confirmation summary is shown BEFORE create_contract is called
create_contract is NOT called until user confirms — Claude stops and asks for approval
create_contract parameters include type='hedge', parameters.price=48.5, parameters.amount=500, parameters.unit='kW', parameters.sensor_direction='in'
Contract metadata is correct: name='Q3 2026 Base Hedge', supplier='Luminus', start_date='2026-07-01', end_date='2026-09-30', category='cost'
